description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves with adidas patented 3-Stripe running through and printed branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Classic adidas tee for the sporty at heart. Made of polyester that neatly contours your shoulders, this T-shirt can be worn under a zip-up sweatshirt and tracks, or simply with jeans and tonal casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
